source.business_scenario: 按 customer_id 聚合,数据分布不均(部分客户消费多)
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS pay_cnt, SUM(amount) AS pay_total
FROM payment
GROUP BY customer_id
HAVING SUM(amount) > 30
LIMIT 10
